title: The Brink of Death
narrative: The fight has spilled into the Death Chamber. The Veil hangs at the centre, its tattered curtain swaying in a wind no one can feel. Sirius, exhilarated to be in a real fight again, is duelling Bellatrix Lestrange three paces from the archway — laughing as he throws hexes. He has not looked behind him. Bellatrix has. Her wand is rising. You have one breath.

options.text: Cast Impedimenta on Bellatrix — break her stance before she can fire.
options.feedback_hint: A clean defensive answer. Bellatrix loses her opening; Sirius wins the duel.

options.text: Cast Protego on Sirius — shield him and push him forward, away from the archway.
options.feedback_hint: A protective shield charm that physically nudges him out of the danger zone.

options.text: Tackle Sirius bodily — get him away from the Veil at any cost.
Cast Stupefy past Sirius at Bellatrix — go for the kill shot.
options.feedback_hint: Sirius is in the line of fire. Even if you miss him, the recoil could push him into the Veil.

categories.label: Move Sirius away from the Veil — pulling, tackling, levitating, summoning, restraining
Cast a defensive spell on Sirius (Protego), or a non-lethal spell on Bellatrix that does not endanger Sirius (Impedimenta, Stupefy on Bellatrix only)
Attack without taking Sirius's position into account; or any spell whose trajectory could push or pull him toward the Veil

free_text.llm_classification_criteria: Classify into exactly one category. PROTECT_PULL is any action that physically moves Sirius away from the Veil. PROTECT_SPELL is any defensive or non-lethal spell that protects Sirius without endangering him. OFFENSIVE_ONLY covers offensive actions that ignore Sirius's exposed position, including spells aimed past him or that could push him toward the archway. INVALID for off-topic, inaction, or nonsense.
